You take ownership of the entire production stack â from prompting and generation to editing, compositing, graphic design work and final delivery. You thrive in a high-performance environment where your quick wits and passion for story-telling shine.</p><p>Reporting to your Content Lead, this is what you'll be doing:</p><p><br /></p><h2>Key Responsibilities</h2><ul><li><p>Conceptualise scripts based on current production needs and centred around existing AI characters (our own IPs)</p></li><li><p>CreateÂ <strong>narrative-driven, longform video content</strong>, including stylized and explicit NSFW visuals, with a strong focus on storytelling, atmosphere, and visual coherence throughout</p></li><li><p>Own and manageÂ <strong>end-to-end AI video production workflows</strong>, from ideation and prompting to generation, editing, and post-production</p></li><li><p>Work extensively withÂ <strong>ComfyUI
